# Cover Crop Seed Co. — LLMs.txt
# https://www.covercropseedcompany.com

> Cover Crop Seed Co. is an agronomic consulting and cover crop seed company
> based in Grass Valley, California (Sierra Foothills, Nevada County).
> We help farmers across the Sacramento Valley and Sierra Foothills integrate
> cover crops into their production systems through quality seeds, customized
> farm-specific programs, and hands-on agronomic support.
>
> We bring over 10 years of global agronomy experience to Northern California
> farming. Our approach: every program is crop-specific and farm-specific.
> We do not sell off-the-shelf solutions.

## Business

- Name: Cover Crop Seed Co. (also: Cover Crop Seed Company)
- Type: Agronomic consulting and cover crop seed supply
- Founded: 2024
- Location: 14209 Colfax Highway, Grass Valley, CA 95945
- Phone: (831) 235-3707
- Email: covercropseedcompany@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.covercropseedcompany.com

## Service Area

Primary: Sacramento Valley and Sierra Foothills, Northern California
Counties served: Nevada County, Placer County, Yolo County, Sutter County,
Butte County, Colusa County, and surrounding areas.
Key cities and areas: Grass Valley, Nevada City, Auburn, Chico, Woodland,
Marysville, Colusa, Orland, Sacramento region.

## Services

1. Cover Crop Seed Supply — Quality seeds selected for Sacramento Valley
   and Sierra Foothill growing conditions. Legumes, grasses, brassicas,
   and custom mixes. Every selection tailored to your soil and rotation.

2. Crop-Specific Programs — Full cover crop programs built around your
   rotation and cash crops. Orchard programs for Placer and Butte counties,
   row crop programs for Yolo and Sutter, foothill programs for Nevada and
   Placer counties.

3. Agronomic Consulting — On-farm consultations throughout the Sacramento
   Valley and Sierra Foothills, implementation guidance, and season-long
   support.

## What We Know

Cover crops, soil health, regenerative agriculture, California agronomy,
Sacramento Valley farming, Sierra Foothills agriculture, Nevada County,
Placer County, Yolo County, Butte County, Colusa County, Sutter County,
orchard cover crops, vineyard cover crops, row crop cover crops,
legumes, grasses, brassicas, crop rotation, farm resilience.

## Key Pages

- Homepage (full site): https://www.covercropseedcompany.com/

## Contact

Call (831) 235-3707, email covercropseedcompany@gmail.com,
or use the contact form at https://www.covercropseedcompany.com/#contact
